news.title:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
